sentences.english: Do you think art and music classes are as important as math and science?
sentences.korean: 미술 음악 수업이 수학 과학만큼 중요하다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I firmly believe that arts education is just as important as STEM subjects.
sentences.korean: 예술 교육이 STEM 과목만큼 중요하다고 확고히 믿어요.

sentences.english: First the arts develop creativity and innovative thinking which are skills that every industry needs.
sentences.korean: 첫째 예술은 모든 산업이 필요로 하는 창의성과 혁신적 사고를 발달시켜요.

sentences.english: Steve Jobs famously said that technology alone is not enough — it must be combined with the liberal arts and humanities.
sentences.korean: 스티브 잡스는 유명하게 말했어요. 기술만으로는 충분하지 않고 인문학과 결합되어야 한다고요.

sentences.english: Second music and art provide emotional outlets that help students manage stress and express themselves in healthy ways.
sentences.korean: 둘째 음악과 미술은 학생들이 스트레스를 관리하고 건강한 방식으로 자신을 표현하도록 돕는 감정적 배출구를 제공해요.

sentences.english: Cutting arts programs to save money is a short-sighted decision that harms students' overall development.
sentences.korean: 비용 절감을 위해 예술 프로그램을 축소하는 것은 학생의 전반적 발달에 해가 되는 근시안적 결정이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Living in the Present vs. Planning Ahead
Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks
